hero.title: About NodeMatics
hero.subtitle: NodeMatics helps solopreneurs, small teams with ambitions work smarter by building lean automation tools and solutions, that save time, reduce repetitive work, and drive growth. We focus on practicality over complexity—using AI and automation to simplify everyday business challenges.

story.title: Who We Are
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2017, NodeMatics started as a hands-on consulting service and has grown into a product-first digital firm. Today, we develop scalable tools like EngagePerfect and SkySpark rule packages that serve creators, consultants, and small businesses around the world.
story.paragraph2: We are a growing team of developers, consultants, and creators who believe in one thing above all: your time is too valuable to be wasted on tasks that can be automated and improved.

improvementConstant.title: Improvement is constant
